text: سَمِعْتُهُ يَقُولُ وَ قَدْ تَجَارَيْنَا ذِكْرَ الصَّعَالِيكِ فَقَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ عَامِرٍ حَدَّثَنِي هَذَا وَ أَوْمَأَ إِلَى أَحْمَدَ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ أَنَّهُ كَتَبَ إِلَى أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام ) يَسْأَلُ عَنْهُمْ فَكَتَبَ إِلَيْهِ اقْتُلْهُمْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from one of our companions, from Abdullah Bin Aamir who said,

‘I heard him saying, and there had flowed among us a mentioned of the vagabonds, so Abdullah Bin Amir said, ‘This one narrated to me’ – and he gestured towards Ahmad Bin Is’haq that he wrote to Abu Muhammad<sup>asws</sup>, asking him<sup>asws</sup> about it, so he<sup>asws</sup> wrote back to him: ‘Kill him’.
